codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies feature intent in the mission workspace: scratch files were deleted, proto/gen directories are absent, and CLAUDE.md stale references were removed while preserving the REST API description.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature requirements included editing CLAUDE.md, but CLAUDE.md is gitignored; this makes commit-based review of that part of the feature non-obvious and non-reproducible from git history alone.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .gitignore:3 ignores CLAUDE.md; git show --stat 7a55f1b186326d9bad4045c35d58e8206e48c697 lists only _sp_main.go and _sp_test.go deletions; handoff discoveredIssues explicitly notes CLAUDE.md changes were only on disk.

sharedStateObservations.observation: refactor-worker procedure lacks explicit guidance for features that require changes to gitignored files, which led to extra churn (force-add attempt, shield block, then commit without the doc file).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session 146279a4-8984-40ce-a664-144c5dcd294e shows attempted git add -f CLAUDE.md and rollback; handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges requests this edge case be covered.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, and commit diff. No blocking correctness issues found for the feature outcome in the current workspace; noted shared-state gaps around gitignored CLAUDE.md handling.
